author: lightclient
content: It’s not the main motivation, it’s just another nice thing we get when the mechanism is generic - and it happens to not be possible with the prix fixe proposals

author: draganrakita
content: The reason why I am saying it is main motivation is that it dictates the main design of the frame tx to support this use case.

author: draganrakita
content: To not drop the main thing, how would private withdrawal be implemented if there is no evm execution in the mix, how would simple protocol for it look like?

author: frangio_
content:
the thing that dictates the design is supporting arbitrary tx authorization mechanisms without the need for relayers. tempo txs are also motivated by the removal of relayers but does this for a specific set of auth primitives

when you dont have protocol-chosen auth primitives you need to use EVM execution to authorize so i don't think it can be removed
